section.small: estimation from 14.8mb of code in 2297 edited files across 429 commits

section.div: QueueCTL is a lightweight, CLI-first distributed job queue that enables asynchronous task processing with worker orchestration, scheduling, retries, dead-letter queues (DLQ), and real-time monitoring using a TypeScript-based daemon architecture.
Enterprise performance management platform supporting KPI governance, goal tracking, quarterly reviews, approval workflows, RBAC, authentication, and analytics dashboards.
AI-powered interview preparation platform featuring mock interviews, resume analysis, speech-to-text, LLM evaluation, personalized learning, and career assistance.
AI-powered disaster response platform integrating computer vision, autonomous monitoring, mapping, and emergency coordination workflows.
Production-inspired authentication system implementing secure login, JWT authentication, refresh tokens, RBAC, email verification, password reset, and protected routes.
